issues.title: Phase632 task template and checklist mandatory rule had encoding-noise drift
issues.reason: Documentation text drift only; README/AGENTS and verifier rules already encode the intended hard rule.
issues.proposedFix: Replace the noisy mandatory-rule text with the exact Chinese hard-rule lines.
issues.rollbackNote: Restore the previous docs text if a downstream verifier unexpectedly depends on the noisy body text.

issues.title: Phase632A-G regression command alias missing
issues.reason: The requested regression command uses a shorter alias that can safely delegate to the existing verified script.
issues.proposedFix: Add verify:phase632a-g-token-saving-mandatory-gate-chain as an alias to the existing chain script.
issues.rollbackNote: Remove the alias if command naming policy changes.

issues.title: Main-chain integration remains design-only
issues.reason: Changing main-chain integration behavior requires a separate explicit phase and approval.
issues.proposedFix: Prepare a separate approval packet before any isolated implementation candidate.

issues.title: Real provider runtime is outside this audit scope
issues.reason: Provider runtime changes could affect real execution semantics and need isolated approval.
issues.proposedFix: Create a future provider-runtime approval and dry-run candidate phase.
issues.rollbackNote: Do not modify provider runtime in audit/bundle phases.

issues.title: Release and production readiness remain unclaimed
issues.reason: Current evidence supports local dry-run/preview and bounded Codex Context Gateway claims only.
issues.proposedFix: Keep productionReady=false and releaseReady=false in final reports.
issues.rollbackNote: Remove any production/release readiness wording if introduced later.
